rationale: Educ. Code §13.155 governs board of trustees status and governance for consolidated school districts. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values.
quote: Sec. 13.155. STATUS; GOVERNANCE. (a) The consolidated district is an independent school district.
_note: No conflict: rule text concerns school district consolidation governance, not property tax exemptions or appraisal values.
